must_detect.matched_text:
Internal Compliance Memorandum — Novacrest Marine Ltd. (Mainboard-listed, Singapore) — PDPA and MNPI handling for proposed acquisition
To: Board Risk Committee; From: Teh & Quill LLP (External Counsel); Date: 26 May 2026
Subject: Proposed acquisition of Harborlight Robotics Pte. Ltd.; confidentiality, trading restrictions, and data minimisation

MNPI: Under the Securities and Futures Act and the local Exchange’s listing rules framework, the indicative price range (SGD 1.10–1.25 per Novacrest share) and draft timetable (signing targeted mid-June) are not generally available and would reasonably be expected to affect price.
PDPA: Personal data processed in due diligence must be adequate but not excessive; we will redact where feasible and aggregate where possible to reduce identifiability risk.
Ms. Farah Lim (b. 12 Aug 1986), Deputy Finance Manager at Novacrest Marine Ltd., accessed the Harborlight data room via VPN session NVPN-88231 from the Westport precinct office at 22:14 SGT on 17 May 2026 using company laptop NM-LTP-4421 and work email farah.lim@novacrest.example.com; May expenses included a SGD 9,800 reimbursement paid to Seahaven Commercial Bank a/c ****3321.
This aggregation of DOB, role, device, office location, session reference, and masked account constitutes quasi-identifiers under PDPA when combined, and must not be circulated outside the deal team.

We expect a mandatory pre-close trading blackout for all insiders from 27 May 2026 until public announcement, and a brief analyst briefing embargo to avoid selective disclosure.
HR is preparing conditional retention packages for three Harborlight engineers; no personal names are included at this stage.
Separately, a 29-year-old marketing intern using device ID MKT-NB-117 in the Eastport district queried the IR page; this generic demographic/device info alone does not identify a person and should not be treated as personal data by itself.
Another log shows an AstralOS handset model Orchid A2 connecting via guest Wi‑Fi at 15:06 SGT; no corporate account or role is linked.

No trading should occur by directors or connected persons pending completion; deal-room access is on a need-to-know basis and recorded in the insider list maintained by the Company Secretary.
Draft timetable and valuation sensitivities are to be coded as Confidential—Price Sensitive; if leakage occurs, prepare a holding statement referencing general industry consolidation without naming counterparties.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
